title: Define Field Interface
text: Define Field Interface Specify the value of the Database Interface property of a field, which specifies how the field is stored. If you have created modeled field interface, click Use modeled to select the one you want to use. This is useful when you want to use the same interface for multiple fields. It is possible to define sub-field definitions, variable-length techniques, and use of I/O translation tables by clicking More . Normally, you do not need to consider these definitions. They are intended only for existing databases that support these features. Fields Data Type Data Packing Fixed Length of Field Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
